'''Pouquor Elegin''' was the code-name of an individual working in the [[Sedition]] branch of [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Elegin gave orders to [[Murtan Andes]] to dismantle [[system cell]] [[Tatooine/3]] and relocated to the [[Al'Nasrl sector/Legends|Al'Nasrl sector]].
